findings.message: owner_email (PII) is written to logs via log.info("item_created", ..., owner_email=payload.owner_email). The Item model explicitly comments that owner_email must not be included in logs. Logging the email address exposes PII in log storage and any downstream log aggregation/retention systems.
findings.suggestion: Do not log the email. Log a non-identifying audit field instead, e.g. log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id), or hash/redact the email if a correlation key is truly required.
